reviews.comment:
Mala atención....5 horas de cola para combustible...pierdes tus vacaciones. Solo para cargar combustible...en todo Iguazú es así...

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service... 5-hour wait for fuel... you ruin your vacation. Just for fuel... it's like this all over Iguazu...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15516558717533724848/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtbHB2el9BRRAB

reviews.comment:
Gente, carguen nafta antes de llegar a iguazu, sino se tendrán de comer 3 horas de cola como nosotros. Al parecer por el bajo precio gente de Brasil y algunos revendedores argentinos serian los responsables de las demoras

(Translated by Google)
Guys, fill up your tank before you get to Iguazu, otherwise you'll be stuck in traffic for three hours like we were. Apparently, the low prices are causing delays, and people from Brazil and some Argentine resellers are responsible.

reviewReply.comment: Hola, como bien dice la cuestión es el tema del precio del combustible en localidades fronterizas. No tiene relación con los vendedores.

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15516558717533724848/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtNXRqdkp3EAE

reviews.comment:
Más de 5 cuadras de cola. Y cuando pasaron media hora avisaron que se terminó la nafta. Es el tercer intento para cargar. Al final venís de vacaciones, 1500 km para pasartela haciendo cola. Una vergüenza.

(Translated by Google)
More than five blocks of traffic. And after half an hour they announced they were out of gas. This is the third attempt to fill up. You come here on vacation, travel 1500 km only to spend it waiting in line. It's a disgrace.

reviewReply.comment: Buenos días, la faltante de combustible es un problema en todo el país, de todas formas lamentamos su mala experiencia.

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15516558717533724848/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtcHRYRTlBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Horas de cola para cargar combustible en Iguazu... solo ponen a 2 playeros que hacen lo que pueden...

(Translated by Google)
Hours-long queues to fill up with fuel in Iguazu... they only have two attendants who do the best they can...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15516558717533724848/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURteHZpVXR3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Pésimo recomiendo mantenerse con el tanque lleno por que en Iguazu no conseguís combustible fácilmente.

(Translated by Google)
I really recommend keeping the tank full because you can't easily get fuel in Iguazu.

They never have fuel; they sell it all to Brazilians and Paraguayans.

reviews.comment:
Una lástima 😕 😞 😔 para cargar tenes que hacer varias hs de cola para cargar, vienen los vecinos País a cargar y vender es sus País, una lastima.  Tan hermoso 💚 nuestro país y pasen ésto.

(Translated by Google)
It's such a shame 😕 😞 😔 To refuel, you have to wait in line for hours. People from neighboring countries come here to refuel and sell in their own countries. It's a real shame. Our country is so beautiful 💚 and then this happens.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15516558717533724848/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURta3VUdE53EAE

The service was very good.

reviews.comment:
Filas interminables y la carga de combustible es muy lenta debido a que las máquinas no andan como deberían. No hacen fila para los diesel o los extranjeros por separado que podría facilitar la vida.

(Translated by Google)
Endless lines and very slow refueling because the pumps aren't working properly. They don't have separate lines for diesel or foreign vehicles, which would make things much easier.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15516558717533724848/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtOUszRFBnEAE
